title: astragalus angulosus
intro: Astragalus angulosus is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family, specifically within the genus Astragalus, which comprises over 2,000 species of legumes. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus angulosus include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus angulosus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
